title: Laboratories Assistant
description:
Join Our Team as a Laboratories Assistant!

Are you passionate about laboratory operations and eager to be part of cutting-edge photovoltaic technology development? We are looking for a highly motivated and detail-oriented Laboratories Assistant to support our growing team. If you thrive in a dynamic environment and have a keen eye for organization and efficiency, this role is for you!

Key Responsibilities:

  • Assist in the preparation of perovskite solutions and materials for experiments.
  • Support in device fabrication processes such as thin film coating, laser scribing, and module assembly under the guidance of engineers.
  • Carry out standard testing and characterization of perovskite solar cells (e.g., efficiency testing, stability tests).
  • Record experimental procedures, observations, and results accurately in laboratory logbooks.
  • Prepare samples for analysis and assist in operating laboratory instruments (e.g., SEM, XRD, UV-Vis).
  • Maintain cleanliness and safety of laboratory workspace, ensuring compliance with safety protocols.
  • Conduct routine calibration and basic maintenance of laboratory equipment.
  • Collaborate closely with internal colleagues in Singapore to support project needs.

What We’re Looking For:

✅ Education: Secondary School/Professional Certificate/NITEC, Diploma, or Degree in any field.
✅ Experience: At least 1 year of relevant experience (Candidates without experience are welcome to apply!).
✅ Skills:

  • Prior laboratory experience, especially in material preparation, device fabrication, or testing, is advantageous.
  • Basic knowledge of photovoltaic devices or semiconductor materials will be a plus.
  • Proficient in laboratory techniques, with attention to accuracy and details.
  • Bilingual skills (English & Mandarin) preferred, as some laboratory equipment and manuals are in Mandarin and require basic understanding to operate.
    ✅ Personal Qualities:
  • Highly organized, responsible, and able to work independently.
  • Ability to multi-task and pay close attention to detail.
  • Positive working attitude, punctual, and takes initiative.
  • Thrives under pressure and can handle a fast-paced environment.
    ✅ Availability: Able to start immediately or on short notice is a plus.
    ✅ Working Hours: 1:00pm - 10:00pm OR 08:30am - 05:30pm

Why Join Us?

🚀 Be part of an innovative and forward-thinking team.
🔬 Gain hands-on experience in the latest photovoltaic technology.
📈 Grow your career in a dynamic and supportive work environment.

Ready to make an impact? Apply now and be part of our exciting journey!

📢 We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

postedCompany.description: Kibing Solar Energy Technology Pte. Ltd. were incorporated, marking the commencement of Kibing’s strategic focus on new energy in Singapore. Through the implementation of revolutionary and forward-looking strategic initiatives within the clean energy sector, Kibing Singapore is poised to specialize in clean energy technology, strategically positioning itself as a leading manufacturer and supplier of premium-grade materials and energy solutions to promote sustainable development in clean energy.
postedCompany.name: KIBING SOLAR ENERGY TECHNOLOGIES PTE. LTD.
